title: The Tendency of Bot Invasion is Crazy
meta_description: The Tendency of Bot Invasion is Crazy - [img]https://telegra.ph/file/373d8d7c37a5240a832a0.png?width=1282&height=2104[/img] Does it make any sense? I don't kno...
contents: Does it make any sense? I don't know why our main moderator is so targeted, and banning all these accounts that flooded in and cursed her literally takes time, while they don't seem giving up on it at all.
